summary_en: ¥11.2B upper limit, 4.0M shares (16.9% of shares outstanding), execution window May 15, 2026–Apr 30, 2027. Rationale: enhance capital efficiency targeting consolidated ROE 15%+, optimize balance sheet, and maintain non-foreign investor status.
title_en: Notice of Determination of Matters Relating to Acquisition of Treasury Shares (Acquisition of Treasury Shares based on Articles of Incorporation under Article 459, Paragraph 1 of the Companies Act)
translation_en_brief:
Buffalo Inc. announced on May 14, 2026 that its board of directors resolved to acquire treasury shares under Article 459, Paragraph 1 of the Companies Act. The company will acquire up to 4.0 million shares of its common stock (16.9% of issued shares outstanding, excluding treasury stock) for an aggregate consideration not to exceed ¥11.2 billion. The acquisition period runs from May 15, 2026 through April 30, 2027.

The stated rationale is to enhance capital-efficiency management with a target consolidated ROE of 15% or higher, while optimizing the balance sheet and maintaining the company's status as a non-foreign investor under the Foreign Exchange and Foreign Trade Act. The acquisition will support fuller shareholder returns alongside these strategic objectives.
